original text:
The information you provide to us via our website, email, mail, or phone, will not be sold or leased to a third party. The information you provide will be used only for providing our services to you.
To send you information you have opted-in to receive.
To respond to your questions, comments and communications.
Statistical analysis and usage patterns.
Diagnosing and troubleshooting issues with this site.
Customizing your experience on this site.
Enforcing the terms of service (TOS) on this site.
Your IP address is logged when you access this website and is used only for generating statistic and diagnostic information to ensure quality of service.
Real Estate Boards of BC, CREA®, MLS® and approved affiliate services.
Our policy may be updated from time to time to reflect changes in regulatory requirements or use case. Data collected prior to any new revisions will be subject to the previous revision unless the newer revision is more restrictive. Continued use after a revision is posted on this page will constitute acceptance of this policy.
System logs such as webserver are kept for a period of one year, systems which perform a function such as our automatic CMA are kept for a period of two weeks and communications, contact information are kept as long as required to provide services to you; you opt-out or are no longer our client.
If you would like to opt-out, please contact support@eliseweatherby.com.

original text: Collapse Print Whatcom Community College in Bellingham, Virginia offers dental assistant certified training for those that are interested in this rewarding career. For information on the types of courses that are available at Collapse Print Whatcom Community College, please telephone Arianne Hayes at (360) 383-3887 or by email at ahayes@whatcom.ctc.edu. Additional school information is provide below.
